# train.replay_buffer { #raccoon.train.replay_buffer }

`train.replay_buffer`

Circular replay buffer for training positions.

## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [ReplayBuffer](#raccoon.train.replay_buffer.ReplayBuffer) | Stores training positions and samples random batches. |

### ReplayBuffer { #raccoon.train.replay_buffer.ReplayBuffer }

```python
train.replay_buffer.ReplayBuffer(max_size=100000)
```

Stores training positions and samples random batches.

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [sample_batch](#raccoon.train.replay_buffer.ReplayBuffer.sample_batch) | Sample a random batch as PyTorch tensors. |

##### sample_batch { #raccoon.train.replay_buffer.ReplayBuffer.sample_batch }

```python
train.replay_buffer.ReplayBuffer.sample_batch(batch_size)
```

Sample a random batch as PyTorch tensors.

Returns:
    obs_batch: (batch, 16, 2, 12)
    policy_batch: (batch, 1352)
    value_batch: (batch,)
